'''Ch'no''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[H'drachi]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. A scrounger and collector of junk, he adopted an infant [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Mora]] after finding her in the rubble of her ruined home after her family was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. As a [[H'Drachi Seers|seer]], Ch'no knew that the young girl would later be revealed as the sole living heir to the ruling house of [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]], but he kept that secret for a long time. Other H'drachi did not enjoy the presence of Humans on M'haeli, seeing them as a scourge to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Ch'no and Mora had the ability to disrupt the [[time-stream]]s on M'haeli, making travel among other H'drachi without detection nearly impossible.
